page.subhead: A focused selection across enterprise platforms, AI integrations, and client engagements — every project below is live or has been delivered to its owners.

cta.eyebrow: Currently accepting new work · Replies within 24h
cta.supporting: One engineer, full ownership, and a 5-year track record of production deliveries. Tell me the goal — I'll come back with a plan and a timeline.

projects.name: VPMS
projects.subtitle: Multi-tenant SaaS for video production agencies
projects.description: Full-stack platform replacing the Asana + Frame.io + Slack patchwork creative studios stitch together. 60+ API endpoints, 25+ pages, real-time WebSocket notifications, token-auth client portal, Stripe billing, white-labeling, and the production deploy pipeline — owned end-to-end. Live at vpms.sovstac.com.

projects.name: FCCMS
projects.subtitle: Housing-society platform shipped solo
projects.description: Live system used daily for resident records, maintenance, inventory, and complaints. Owned end-to-end: PostgreSQL schema, Laravel REST APIs, Next.js + TypeScript UI, AWS deployment, CI/CD.

projects.name: Network Scanner Suite
projects.subtitle: IT automation that buys back hours
projects.description: Python tooling for daily corporate IT operations — a network scanner and a remote installer that rolls out endpoint software across the network without touching individual machines.

projects.name: AI-Powered Web Apps
projects.subtitle: LLM features in real client products
projects.description: Production AI work across multiple client applications — LLM-powered features, conversational interfaces, and prompt-engineered workflows on OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, and Google Gemini.

projects.name: Panther Tech Engagements
projects.subtitle: Contract feature work for shipped products
projects.description: Scoped customization, feature builds, and bug fixes inside existing client codebases — delivered on tight timelines with clean handoffs back to internal teams.

projects.name: Capregsoft Production Apps
projects.subtitle: Full-stack products across the SDLC
projects.description: Architected and shipped multiple full-stack web products — relational schemas, Laravel and Django REST APIs, and TypeScript React/Next.js frontends — backed by MySQL and PostgreSQL.

projects.name: Linknb1t Platform Work
projects.subtitle: Real-time Laravel apps for internal teams
projects.description: Promoted from PHP intern to Software Engineer in the first month. Engineered Laravel + MySQL applications and shipped real-time interfaces using Laravel Livewire and AJAX-driven workflows.
